title: Makefile: use go proxy
body:
Use GOPROXY=https://proxy.golang.org to speed up fetching dependencies.
Setting it makes `make vendor` six times faster in my local env.

For details please refer to https://proxy.golang.org/.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: Do I understand correctly that this will become the default in Go 1.13, and we are merely opting in early? If so, LGTM.

> Do I understand correctly that this will become the default in Go 1.13, and we are merely opting in early? If so, LGTM.

That's correct. Go < 1.13 will follow us a while (at least in CI), so I found it nice to speed up things so cheaply.

Merging as we have 2 x LGTM
